metadata.title: SYNGO_CC_2316
metadata.comment:
Rationale: Results: "Cadherin-10 is localized to excitatory and inhibitory pre- and post-synaptic sites"
- Literal "To assess pre- vs. post-synaptic location of cadherin-10, we performed immunogold-EM, which showed cadherin-10 labeling was both at the presynaptic active zone and the PSD of excitatory synapses (Fig. 2A). Double labeling for the inhibitory neurotransmitter GABA revealed that cadherin-10 gold particles were also present pre- and postsynaptically at inhibitory synapses"

30/12/2017 Pim
- Based on the known transmembrane topology of the protein, the "integral component of ... membrane" term was chosen.. Experimental description: Materials and Methods: "Cortical slice preparation and imaging: Male Sprague-Dawley rats were deeply anesthetized...."
